COUNTDOWN.TITLE: Coming Soon
COUNTDOWN.SUBTITLE: We are planting the seeds of a greener future. Very soon you will be able to access forest+.
COUNTDOWN.NOTIFY_ME: Leave us your email and we will notify you as soon as we open access:
COUNTDOWN.SUCCESS_MSG: Thank you! We'll notify you as soon as we open access.

HOME.TITLE: Manage your digital forest, measure your real impact
HOME.SUBTITLE: forest+ is a reforestation startup designed for individuals and companies that measure every planted tree. Create your digital forest and track the impact in real time with our dashboard. From individuals aiming for Net Zero to large companies complying with regulations: one platform, one purpose, verifiable impact.

HERO.TITLE: Manage your digital forest, measure your real impact
HERO.SUBTITLE: forest+ is a reforestation startup designed for individuals and companies that measure every planted tree. Create your digital forest and track the impact in real time with our dashboard. From individuals aiming for Net Zero to large companies complying with regulations: one platform, one purpose, verifiable impact.

FEATURES.TITLE: Join the change
FEATURES.DESC: Discover how your digital forest can regenerate territory, care for the climate, and help you make sustainable decisions every month.

B1.TITLE: Create your own forest
B1.DESC: Every payment translates into trees planted in real projects, with species and locations designed to regenerate climate, water, and soil.

B2.TITLE: See your impact, not just numbers
B2.DESC: Your digital forest shows you trees, offset CO₂, and regeneration stories, so you feel you are moving the needle every month.

B3.TITLE: Accompaniment
B3.DESC: We answer questions, explain projects, and provide context so each decision is made with information and environmental awareness.

B4.TITLE: Corporate impact
B4.DESC: The trees in your forest generate certificates and reports useful for communication, ESG, and regulatory compliance when you need it.

B5.TITLE: Clear values
B5.DESC: forest+ is born to care for the territory and its inhabitants, always prioritizing the health of ecosystems over any other interest.

B6.TITLE: You participate in something collective
B6.DESC: Every tree you add is integrated into shared projects with city councils and other people, amplifying your impact.

TESTIMONIALS.TITLE: What They Say About Us
TESTIMONIALS.DESC: Discover the vision and impact of forest+ through its founders, mentors, and those who trust our commitment to the environment and innovation.

T1.TEXT: I fully trust the founders of forest+, they intend to impact and regenerate the environment. Their goal is to drive society to take active action on our planet.
T1.AUTHOR: Ana Adán

T2.TEXT: Our journey begins with reforestation, but our vision encompasses all dimensions of sustainability: carbon, water, soil, biodiversity. This is the first step towards a comprehensive platform.
T2.AUTHOR: Daniel

T3.TEXT: It has been a success to see their growth in our accelerator. The elegance of forest+ lies in its simplicity: it connects digital will with real regeneration of the territory. Clicks that turn into trees, into data, into future.
T3.AUTHOR: Fran

GROW.TITLE: Grow with impact
GROW.DESC: Our values are people and the environment: we seek to grow sustainably, regenerate ecosystems and accompany you so that your impact is real and lasting.

OTHERS.TITLE: Other Tools
OTHERS.ITEM1: Priority to business, not to the ecosystem
OTHERS.ITEM2: They think of CO₂, ignore soil and water
OTHERS.ITEM3: Impact in PDFs, not in trees

US.TITLE: forest+
US.ITEM2: We care for soil, water, climate and biodiversity
US.ITEM4: Certificates for you and your company

CONTACT.TITLE: Want to know more?
CONTACT.DESC: Write to us if you want more information, to better understand how your digital forest works, or to talk about a project for you or your company.

DASHBOARD.PANEL: This is your personal dashboard on forest+.

STEPS.TITLE: Next steps
STEPS.DESCRIPTION: Here you can start developing the features of your new project.
